# Waterhouse Studios

> Music studio rental, artist residency, live events and weekly online radio in Amsterdam (Houthaven). 25 acoustically designed studios built by DJs and musicians for creators. Address: Danzigerkade 1, 1013 AP Amsterdam, Netherlands. Contact: info@waterhousestudios.nl.

## Rent a studio
- Shared studio: €30/hour, or bundles (10h €150, 20h €200, 40h €250, 60h €300)
- Solo studio: €1,100/month, private 24/7 access
- Atelier (creative office): €500/month
- All plans include stream-room access.

## Key pages
- [Studios](https://waterhousestudios.nl/studios): music studio rental, equipment and pricing
- [Ateliers](https://waterhousestudios.nl/ateliers): creative office space for artists and music professionals
- [Residency](https://waterhousestudios.nl/residency): artist development program (workshops, mentorship, performances)
- [Radio](https://waterhousestudios.nl/radio): weekly online radio and live DJ streams on Twitch
- [Events](https://waterhousestudios.nl/events): live events at the venue (capacity up to 120)
- [About](https://waterhousestudios.nl/about): who we are
- [FAQ](https://waterhousestudios.nl/faq): common questions about renting and visiting
- [Contact](https://waterhousestudios.nl/contact): location, directions and enquiries

## Links
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/waterhousestudiosamsterdam
- Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/waterhousestudios
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@Waterhouse_Studios
